name: Healer
description: Part physician, part herbalist, part counselor. The healer patches wounds, sets bones, and knows which villagers aren't sleeping well.
dialogue_hooks: assessing your injuries at a glance before you even ask
warning about a sickness going around
needing a rare herb from a dangerous location
confiding worry about a patient they can't help
sharing folk remedies with practical advice
voice_patterns: gentle but firm — the bedside manner of someone used to being obeyed
weary but compassionate — they've seen too much
brisk and clinical — no time for pleasantries

schedule.night: on call — a healer never truly rests
